title: Grinding and Polishing Workers, Hand
description: Grind, sand, or polish, using hand tools or hand-held power tools, a variety of metal, wood, stone, clay, plastic, or glass objects. Includes chippers, buffers, and finishers.

tasks.text: Verify quality of finished workpieces by inspecting them, comparing them to templates, measuring their dimensions, or testing them in working machinery.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Grind, sand, clean, or polish objects or parts to correct defects or to prepare surfaces for further finishing, using hand tools and power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure and mark equipment, objects, or parts to ensure grinding and polishing standards are met.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Trim, scrape, or deburr objects or parts, using chisels, scrapers, and other hand tools and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mark defects, such as knotholes, cracks, and splits, for repair.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Study blueprints or layouts to determine how to lay out workpieces or saw out templates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Move controls to adjust, start, or stop equipment during grinding and polishing processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load and adjust workpieces onto equipment or work tables, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair and maintain equipment, objects, or parts, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select files or other abrasives, according to materials, sizes and shapes of workpieces, amount of stock to be removed, finishes specified, and steps in finishing processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: File grooved, contoured, and irregular surfaces of metal objects, such as metalworking dies and machine parts, to conform to templates, other parts, layouts, or blueprint specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sharpen abrasive grinding tools, using machines and hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transfer equipment, objects, or parts to specified work areas, using moving devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove completed workpieces from equipment or work tables, using hand tools, and place workpieces in containers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record product and processing data on specified forms.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Apply solutions and chemicals to equipment, objects, or parts, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean brass particles from files by drawing file cards through file grooves.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
